changelog: Daybook: added line-level drill-down and CSV export.
Reports: added Doctor-wise Sales and Expiry reports.
Settings: added heading/body font selection under Appearance.
Purchase Orders: can now edit lines (product/qty/expected rate) after creation, while still draft/approved/ordered.
Patients: added email and structured city/state/pincode fields.
Bulk product import: auto-detects pack size/unit from free-text pack descriptors and auto-computes loose-sale pricing when not specified.
